steps: Go to https://app.clickup.com and log in or create a free account
Click your avatar in the upper-right corner
In the left sidebar, scroll down and click 'Apps'
Under 'API Token', click 'Generate' (or copy your existing token)
Copy the personal API token shown
notes: Free tier is available — personal tokens work on all plans
The token is sent directly in the Authorization header without a prefix (no 'Bearer')
Personal tokens have full access to all workspaces your account belongs to
Regenerating the token invalidates the old one immediately

test_endpoint.description: Get the authenticated user's profile to verify credentials
